Definition: Compound-Extension mit den Teilslices coding und value zur Beschreibung eines einzelnen Features inklusive Aktivierungszustand.
Comments: Diese Extension kann auf CapabilityStatement-Ebene mehrfach wiederholt werden (0..*), um die komplette Feature-Menge eines konkreten Systems zu beschreiben.
Condition(s):
ele-1:All FHIR elements must have a @value or children {hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())}
ext-1:Must have either extensions or value[x], not both {extension.exists() != value.exists()}

Definition: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

Short: Container für die Child-Slices coding und value
Definition: Enthält die verpflichtenden Child-Slices für Feature-Code und Feature-Status.
Comments: Nur die Slices coding und value sind zulässig.
Slicing Description: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url
Constraint(s):
ele-1:All FHIR elements must have a @value or children {hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())}
ext-1:Must have either extensions or value[x], not both {extension.exists() != value.exists()}

Definition:
Canonical-URL, die das Feature eindeutig identifiziert.
Für gematik-eigene Features: `https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/FeatureDefinition/<Name>`.
Die zulässigen Werte sind im ValueSet GEM_ERP_VS_CapabilityStatement_Feature
als Konzept-URIs definiert.
Comments: Entspricht `extension[definition].valueCanonical` im HL7 Application Feature Framework.
Condition(s):
ele-1:All FHIR elements must have a @value or children {hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())}
ext-1:Must have either extensions or value[x], not both {extension.exists() != value.exists()}

Definition: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

Slicing Description: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url
Constraint(s):
ele-1:All FHIR elements must have a @value or children {hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())}
ext-1:Must have either extensions or value[x], not both {extension.exists() != value.exists()}

Short: identifies the meaning of the extension
Definition: Source of the definition for the extension code - a logical name or a URL.
Comments: The definition may point directly to a computable or human-readable definition of the extensibility codes, or it may be a logical URI as declared in some other specification. The definition SHALL be a URI for the Structure Definition defining the extension.

Definition: Value of extension - must be one of a constrained set of the data types (see [Extensibility](http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/extensibility.html) for a list).
Condition(s): ele-1:All FHIR elements must have a @value or children {hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())}

Definition: Beschreibt, ob das in definition referenzierte Feature in dieser Umgebung aktiv ist.
Comments: true = aktiv; false = deklariert, aber derzeit nicht aktiv.
Condition(s):
ele-1:All FHIR elements must have a @value or children {hasValue() or (children().count() > id.count())}
ext-1:Must have either extensions or value[x], not both {extension.exists() != value.exists()}

Definition: Boolean-Wert zur Laufzeitaktivierung des referenzierten Features.
Comments: Soll den effektiven Betriebszustand der referenzierten Funktionalität wiedergeben.
